choices.text: 600+ GB for full chain (no prune). Or prune=5500 for last 5.5 GB only (saves disk but can't serve historical blocks, limits Lightning). SSD recommended for faster IBD.
Verify GPG signatures + SHA256 checksums: gpg --verify SHA256SUMS.asc + sha256sum -c SHA256SUMS. Catches tampered downloads. Compromised binary = wallet drained.

questions.explanation: GPG + SHA256 verification mandatory for security.
